zh.Norbury near Malpas, Marbury, Cheshire,: 英國爾馬布里諾波利 亞爾 馬爾帕斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John de Hyde於1355年出生在英國爾諾波利時，他的父親Ralph de Hyde I28歲，母親Alice de Venables20歲。他於大約1376年與Lady Matilde de Massey在英國英格蘭藍卡爾丹頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1440年在他的家鄉享年85歲。

zh-hans.Norbury near Malpas, Marbury, Cheshire,: 英国爾馬布里諾波利 亞爾 馬爾帕斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John de Hyde于1355年出生在英国爾諾波利时，他的父亲Ralph de Hyde I28岁，母亲Alice de Venables20岁。他于大约1376年与Lady Matilde de Massey在英国英格兰藍卡爾丹頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1440年在他的家乡享年85岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hyde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or other of various places so called in Bedfordshire, Cheshire, Hampshire, and Middlesex. They were named with Old English hīd ‘hide (of land)’, a variable measure of land, differing from place to place and time to time, and seems to have been originally fixed as the amount necessary to support one (extended) family (Old English hīgan, hīwan ‘household’). The surname may also be topographic for someone living on (and farming) a hide of land. The Hyde family has been in Leinster, Ireland, since the early 13th century and one family has been established in the county of Cork since the 16th century. The name was Gaelicized as both Dalaithíd and de hÍde. Compare Hyder .

variants.name: Dollarhide
meanings: Irish: possibly an altered form of de la Hyde (see Hyde ), which was a prominent surname in Leinster from medieval times onward. Compare Dollahite .

History: Francis Dollahide, born c. 1650–60 in County Dublin, Ireland, was the ancestor of Americans with the surname Dollahide, Dollahite, and Dollarhide. In 1680 he was transported to MD for some youthful misdemeanor. He appears to have been an educated man and rose to be an important landowner and politician, serving in the Lower House of the MD legislature as an elected representative for Baltimore County from c. 1705 to 1721.

variants.name: Hyder
meanings: English (Kent and Sussex): status name or topographic name for one who lived on or possessed a hide of land, from Middle English hide + the locative suffix -er. This is a characteristically southeastern English name, synonymous with Middle English atte hide elsewhere (see Hyde ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John de Hyde was born in 1355, in Norbury, Cheshire, England, his father, Ralph de Hyde I, was 28 and his mother, Alice de Venables, was 20. He married Lady Matilde de Massey about 1376, in Denton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1440, in his hometown, at the age of 85.

fr.Norbury near Malpas, Marbury, Cheshire,: Norbury near Malpas, Marbury, Cheshire, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John de Hyde est né en 1355, à Norbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Ralph de Hyde I, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Alice de Venables, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Lady Matilde de Massey environ 1376, à Denton, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1440, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 85 ans.

Er hat um 1376 in Denton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Lady Matilde de Massey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1440 im Alter von 85 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

Lui sposato Lady Matilde de Massey circa 1376, nel Denton, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1440, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 85 anni.

ko.Norbury near Malpas, Marbury, Cheshire,: 영국 체실르 마버이 노르버이 니아어 맬파스
ko.lifeSummary: Sir John de Hyde(이)가 1355년 영국 체실르 노르버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph de Hyde I(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Venables(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1376년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 덴턴에서 Lady Matilde de Massey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1440년 그의 고향에서 85세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Hyde nasceu em 1355, em Norbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph de Hyde I, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Venables, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Matilde de Massey aproximadamente 1376, em Denton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1440, em sua cidade natal, com 85 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John de Hyde родился в 1355 г. в местности норбури, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Ralph de Hyde I было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Venables, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Matilde de Massey около 1376 г. в местности дентон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1440 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 85 лет.

Se casó con Lady Matilde de Massey aproximadamente 1376, en Denton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1440, en su pueblo, a la edad de 85 años.
